visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a spacious warehouse store, identified by the large Costco logo at the top. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a pale pink top and a white skirt, stands in an aisle lined with tall industrial shelves. She smiles broadly and gestures with her hands towards the camera, conveying excitement. The background is filled with various bulk products and shelving units, illuminated by bright, overhead industrial lighting. (2) The woman turns to the shelf on her right and retrieves two large green bottles of TheraBreath mouthwash, which are packaged together. She brings the bottles close to the camera, making the brand name and orange caps clearly visible. Her facial expressions are animated and engaging as she talks. The camera follows her movements in a handheld fashion, keeping her and the product in the center of the frame. (3) Holding the twin-pack of mouthwash, she points to the labels and continues her presentation. Colorful text boxes and a graphic of a pink bottle appear as overlays on the screen. She demonstrates the size of the bottles and continues to use expressive hand gestures. The surrounding environment remains the well-lit, busy aisle of the warehouse store, with more products visible in the deep background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 美國超夯!. [Variety]: 最新王者漱口水. [Subtitle]: 各位白女VLOG的愛好者們. (2) [Variety]: 大家都愛買. [Subtitle]: 不用再網購了. (3) [Slogan]: 凱斯博士. [Variety]: 漱口水溫和薄荷. [Subtitle]: 哇嗚 凱斯博士. (4) [Slogan]: 美國牙醫認證. [Variety]: 溫和漱口水. [Subtitle]: 漱口水美國牙醫認證溫和漱口水. (5) [Subtitle]: 大家都知道漱口水其實不要買有酒精的其實會很傷口腔. (6) [Subtitle]: 嗯這個無酒精 又是美國白女大推的 不用再網購 以前那個網購運費超貴又超重. (7) [Variety]: 699元 所以一罐350元. [Subtitle]: 699元所以一罐350元. (8) [Variety]: 最紅的款應該是粉色的. [Subtitle]: 雖然它現在只有綠色的最紅的款應該是粉色的但是也是很不錯選擇. (9) [Subtitle]: 它的味道如何 它的味道就是一個溫涼的薄荷味. (10) [Subtitle]: 它這個默默上新在藥局旁邊所以大家看到不要錯過.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in the foreground.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a light pink off-the-shoulder wrap top and a white textured skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A large warehouse retail environment with tall metal shelving units stacked with various household items, boxes, and cleaning supplies.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio starts with high-energy female Mandarin speech delivered at a rapid pace. The tone is bright and enthusiastic, with a high vocal pitch. Accompanying the speech is an upbeat pop-electronic background music track with a strong 4/4 rhythm and a tempo of approximately 124 BPM. A distinct "ding" sound effect triggers right at the start as text appears. (2) A "whoosh" sound effect occurs as the speaker transitions to showing the product, indicating a post-production edit. Her voice maintains a high arousal level and positive valence, with minimal pauses. The music continues steadily in the background, well-balanced with the vocal track. The ambient floor is extremely quiet, suggesting the use of a directional microphone. (3) Another "pop" sound effect is heard as a new text overlay regarding the price appears. The speaker's delivery remains consistent, with clear articulation and professional clarity. The BGM maintains its rhythmic drive, providing a consistent emotional floor for the product review. The overall mix has a high signal-to-noise ratio. (4) As the video concludes, the speaker's tone remains friendly and inviting. The music track continues until a sudden hard cut at the very end. The speech density remains high throughout the segment, with the speaker providing a continuous stream of information without any strategic silences.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a shopping recommendation and product review, specifically highlighting the availability and price advantage of TheraBreath mouthwash at Costco compared to online retailers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The speaker explicitly presents the product, details its benefits, shows its price, and recommends viewers to buy it at the specific store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social-media style shopping vlog characterized by high information density, rapid speech, and bright, high-contrast visual editing with frequent text overlays.
